nasb.text: The guilt offering is like the sin offering, there is one law for them; the priest who makes atonement with it shall have it.

esv.text: The guilt offering is just like the sin offering; there is one law for them. The priest who makes atonement with it shall have it.

cnv.text: 贖罪祭怎樣，贖愆祭也怎樣；兩個祭的律例相同；祭物要歸主持贖罪的祭司，

ccb.text: 祭物要归主持祭礼的祭司，这一条例也适用于赎罪祭。
